message:
fix: subagent max_turns always defaults to 50, not inherited (GAP-7.03)

When a parent session has MaxTurns=100, subagents were inheriting that
value instead of defaulting to 50. The else-if guard only applied the
default when the inherited value was <= 0, which never triggered since
the parent always had a positive value. Changed to unconditionally set
50 when the caller doesn't specify max_turns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
